title: SignResult
description: Result of `rebar sign <ticket_id> <manifest_json> --output json` (and the library sign_manifest() / MCP sign_manifest): the persisted SIGNATURE record plus the resolved ticket_id. manifest is the array of verified-step strings; signed_at is a ns-epoch integer. Contract phase (story 8f1d): the expand-phase dual-shape window is CLOSED — `sign_manifest` now mints ONLY the asymmetric op-cert record (algorithm `sshsig`, an `envelope` DSSE string, `principal`, `material_fingerprint`, `merged_log_commit`); the legacy symmetric HMAC scheme is retired for the op-cert kinds, so `signature`/`key_id` (HMAC) are never emitted. A validation/resolve failure emits no JSON (stderr + nonzero exit).

envelope.description: Encoded rebar.opcert.v1 DSSE envelope (the asymmetric op-cert record).

principal.description: The DSSE principal (environment id) the op-cert was signed under.

material_fingerprint.description: The material fingerprint bound into the op-cert subject.

merged_log_commit.description: The bound commit (verified-at sha, else HEAD) the op-cert subject binds.

head_sha.description: Audit metadata: HEAD at signing time.

signature.description: RETIRED (story 8f1d): the legacy HMAC-SHA256 hex. Never emitted for op-cert records; retained nullable only so a reader tolerates a pre-contract record.

key_id.description: RETIRED (story 8f1d): the legacy HMAC environment key fingerprint. Never emitted for op-cert records; retained nullable only for pre-contract records.
